---
title: "Face familiarity and similarity: Within- and between-identity representations are altered by learning"
authors: "Kramer, R. S. S., Jones, A. L., & Fitousi, D."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Experimental Psychology: Human Perception & Performance"
doi: "10.1037/xhp0001317"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/kramerjonesfitousi2025.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
